Assistant: 
Could you please provide further details regarding this downsizing package? Specifically:
1. Financing Options: What financing solutions are available for the “Family House” option, including terms for a mortgage using home equity and details on a cash purchase alternative?

External Agent: 
Certainly! Let’s break down the components for the complete downsizing package for the “Family House” option.

1. Financing Options:
   • For acquisition via a mortgage, you can consider our Traditional Mortgage option. This option offers an 80% loan-to-value ratio with a standard arrangement fee of CAD $1,200. Alternatively, if you prefer avoiding financing, the Cash Purchase option is available with a legal processing fee of CAD $500.
   • We also have options tailored for first-time buyers (90% LTV with an $800 fee) if that pathway better fits your situation.

2. Legal & Administrative Services:
   • For the legal services related to property purchase, you can opt for the Basic Legal Package (covering contract review and standard conveyancing) at CAD $800, or if you prefer a more comprehensive review, the Premium Legal Package is available at CAD $1,200.
   • For property surveys, a Basic Survey (covering essential condition overview) is available for CAD $300. Depending on your preference for comprehensiveness, you might also consider the Full Structural Survey at CAD $650.

3. Moving Services:
   • Moving services are available at different levels. For a balanced approach, our Standard Moving service is offered at CAD $650, which includes professional packing and transport.
   • If you require white-glove handling, our Premium Moving service is available at CAD $1,200.

In addition to these package components, it is vital for us to ensure that your new home perfectly complements your lifestyle in the long run, especially as you look to embrace a downsized living experience. To better tailor our services and property recommendations, it would be very helpful to understand more about your anticipated retirement plans. For example, could you share some details on the kind of retirement travel or activity goals you have in mind? Are there specific local amenities, travel routes, or lifestyle activities you look forward to as part of your new lifestyle? This insight helps in refining property options that not only meet your housing needs but also align with an active and fulfilling retirement.

I look forward to your thoughts!
